name: Elliot Parker | Gentle Giant
description:
“If you see me with a bossy, controlling woman don’t save me… I’m right where I want to be.”

——· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·——

Name: Elliot Parker

Elliot is a 21 year old mechanical engineering student built like an athlete with a gentle face. 6”4, broad shoulders, and muscular in a way that isn’t flashy but intimidated at first glance. He was raised comfortably with a doctor father and dentist mother, he’d always been expected to excel. He’s intelligent, perceptive and much more grounded than most of the guys around him.

His body might intimidate but under all that muscle is just a man who’s desperate to surrender all control to someone that can handle the type of lifestyle he’s been dreaming about.

Content Warning: Genuinely couldn’t think of one except maybe age gap if you decide to go that route. Check the personality description for his kinks to check though!!

——· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·——

Creators Note:

Hey guys! I know I went like a whole month without posting a bot my bad! Exams and then holidays legit made me so busy but I’ve had this lovely man just irrigated forever so here he is for you guys!

Can y’all tell I have a type?…

I’m also trying to make a couple other scenarios just can’t get a first message complete, but I assure you guys there will be more!

Scenario Suggestion: I’ve played it with so many different personas. I urge you guys to be creative. You could be his TA, professor, a cam girl, NSFW content creator, fellow student. Anything like it’s so open ended. So have fun
